arena_rules: Children must be supervised by a parent or guardian at all times.
Socks are mandatory for all players — available at the front desk.
No food or beverages inside the play area.
Children with injuries or health conditions must consult staff before playing.
PlayStudio is not responsible for lost or stolen belongings.
Rough play, climbing on safety nets, or aggressive behaviour is not permitted.
Staff decisions regarding safety rules are final.
By proceeding, you agree to the PlayStudio Terms & Conditions.
